message:
refactor(conformance): hoist fixture I/O out of mode loop and extract _with_fixture helpers

Reduce redundant disk I/O in the forensics matrix by loading fixture
files once before the mode iteration loop instead of per-mode.

- Extract run_scalar_conformance_with_fixture(),
  run_tensor_meta_conformance_with_fixture(), and
  run_dispatch_conformance_with_fixture() from their public wrappers,
  accepting a borrowed fixture reference instead of loading from disk
- Move all six packet_in_scope() boolean checks before the mode loop
- Pre-load scalar, tensor_meta, and dispatch fixture files conditionally
  based on which packets are in scope, storing as Option<...>
- Switch fixture case iteration from by-value to by-reference
- Add new test packet_e2e_microbench_cpu_kernel_produces_percentiles
  for FT-P2C-005 packet

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
